songs.title: Before the Lobotomy
feed: “Before the Lobotomy” by Green Day returns to #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for a 2nd nonconsecutive week at the top.
“Before the Lobotomy” by Green Day is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 87 sales units.
“Before the Lobotomy” by Green Day is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 145 streams units.
“Before the Lobotomy” by Green Day is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 397,488 total units.

songs.title: Hitchin' a Ride
feed: “Hitchin' a Ride” by Green Day climbs inside the top 5 of Personal Hot 100, rising 41 spots to #5.
“Hitchin' a Ride” by Green Day is the biggest percentage gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week, rising 210% to 332 points.

songs.title: Nice Guys Finish Last
feed: “Nice Guys Finish Last” by Green Day is the #1 most airplayed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 10 airplay units.
